spec.name: Igor's Implements Of Destruction
spec.description: You can't help but shiver as you look at the selection of vicious weapons. Huge swords and wicked looking axes hang on pegs around the room. A dwarf sits at a bench in the back hammering away on his latest creation. It is here you can buy rare and exotic items not found in other parts of the world. A note catches your eye.

extra_descs.description: The note simply reads: READ THE NOTE IN THE ARMOURY Igor.
